docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MAURIN, SHERRI C. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MCLAIRD, SEAN DBA COSTELLO'S TREE SERVICE $375.00 PRINCIPAL, $52.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $427.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
